pi_items.source: Web search for 'Vayupath Aerial Technologies' returned similar companies (Vaayu Drones, Vayu Drone Technologies, Vayudh) but no exact match. 'Vayupath Services LLP' exists in India registered as Computer/IT services, not drone operations.
No verification found for 'Vayupath' as a common name for any real drone/aerial company. Vayupath Services LLP exists but is not an aerial technologies company.
Web search for 'vayupath.in' domain and whois registration returned no confirmation of active website. Domain status could not be verified through search results.
Web search for 'ops@vayupath.in' email returned no results confirming this email address exists or is associated with any company.

pi_items.verified_value: +91-80-XXXX-XXXX (valid format with +91 country code and 80 Bangalore area code)
pi_items.source: Phone number format verified: +91 is India's country code (per ISO standards), 80 is Bangalore/Karnataka STD code per multiple sources including nativeplanet.com and mapsofindia.com. However, the specific number 4567-8901 could not be confirmed as belonging to Vayupath.
ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 standard specifies India's country code as IN per localizely.com, iso.org, and wikipedia.org sources.
Localhost URL corresponds to Django admin interface for Aerobridge system running locally on port 8000, as confirmed in setup_task.sh and task_utils.sh. This is the standard Django admin URL pattern.

privileged_info_summary: This task uses synthetic test data. The company 'Vayupath Aerial Technologies' does not appear to exist in public records; while 'Vayupath Services LLP' is registered in India, it is classified as a computer services company, not aerial/drone operations. The website vayupath.in and email ops@vayupath.in could not be verified. The phone number uses valid India (+91) and Bangalore (80) codes but the specific number cannot be confirmed. India's country code IN is correct per ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 standard. The admin URL is a localhost address for the Django-based Aerobridge system, which is a real open-source drone management system.
